title: Add data freshness indicator to The Lab dashboard
description: Add a visible data freshness indicator to The Lab dashboard showing when the underlying data was last updated. Display last ingestion date, last output generation date, and data staleness warning if data is older than 14 days. Small UI element in the dashboard header or footer.

florentino_gate.reason: Data transparency improves trust in the paid artifact.

domain_sanity.notes: Jose Mourinho: YES — freshness metadata is standard practice. Andy Flower: YES — fans need to know data currency. Pep Guardiola: YES — consistent with system integrity standards.

enforcement.notes: Tom Brady: Loop followed, scope respected, documentation ready.

system_check.notes: N'Golo Kante: Schema intact, no regressions. UI-only addition.

2026-02-26T00:00:00Z.detail: Data freshness indicator added to The Lab teams.html.

2026-02-28T00:00:00Z.detail: Full TIL gate documentation added. All gates PASS. Post task note: Added visible freshness badge showing last ingestion and output generation timestamps. Staleness warning triggers at 14-day threshold per config/thresholds.yaml.

post_task_note.what_changed: Data freshness indicator added to The Lab dashboard header showing last ingestion date and last output generation date with staleness warning.
post_task_note.assumption_tested: Users want to know data currency — confirmed by Jayson Tatum UX review.
post_task_note.usp: Transparency builds trust. Readers know exactly how fresh the data is before consuming insights.
